dataHeroPensiones.title: Pension solutions
dataHeroPensiones.description: Our software <bold>is designed for pension funds, insurers, and financial institutions looking to transform their management.</bold> With our platforms, you can manage severance, mandatory and voluntary pensions, and settle life annuities with full traceability, efficiency, and regulatory compliance.

titlePensiones1.title:
Pension system challenges in
Latin America and how you can
manage them with our software
titlePensiones1.description: The pension system in Latin America faces transformations that require <bold>vision and technology:</bold>

titlePensiones2.description: With our pension solutions you get scalable and secure software, aligned with regulations and designed to guarantee trust and sustainability.

titlePensiones3.title:
A unique, modular and scalable
pension platform
titlePensiones3.description:
Our pension software centralizes the administration of the pension system in a single core technology platform, enabling the integrated management of mandatory pensions, voluntary pensions, severance pay, and annuities.

Its modular and customizable design allows it to adapt to the regulations of each country in Latin America, handle high operational volumes, and guarantee traceability, control, and consistency of information throughout the entire pension cycle.

cardPensiones3.title: Mandatory Pensions Module
cardPensiones3.description: Manages the complete cycle of the affiliate, from design, affiliation to recognition and payment of the pension, <bold>Under different regimes and regulatory frameworks.</bold>

items.textos: Administration of affiliations, employment history, and contributions
Settlement of pensions in capitalization, pay-as-you-go, or mixed schemes.
Management of news, transfers, withdrawals, and status changes.
Integrated pensioner payroll, with massive processes and total control.
Regulatory parameterization per country and continuous update to regulatory changes.
Integration with regulatory, accounting, and collection systems.
Generation of executive and detailed reports
Designed with user experience in mind for greater ease of use.
360° view of the affiliate and employers, providing unified access to bank accounts, relationships, and obligation status.

cardPensiones3.textoFooter: We manage 48% of mandatory pensions in Colombia, representing USD 63 billion

cardPensiones3.title: Life Annuities and Pensioner Payroll Module
cardPensiones3.description: Manages the settlement and periodic payment of life annuities and pensioner payroll from a <bold>100% web and highly automated platform.</bold>

items.textos: Automatic settlement of life annuities.
Management of survivorships, substitutions, and temporalities.
Mass processes for calculation and dispersion of payments.
Notifications to the pensioner about payments and adjustments.
Integrated document manager for auditing and traceability.
Electronic dossier, notifications, integration with document manager, upload component, and file generation.
Adapts to pension funds, insurers, and occupational risk companies, allowing you to manage both pensioner payrolls and life annuities in one place.

cardPensiones3.title: Voluntary Pensions Module
cardPensiones3.description: Manages voluntary pension savings schemes from a multi-fund logic, flexible and aimed at affiliate self-management, with a complete set of processes that <bold>Cover financial, operational, and risk management</bold>

items.textos: Administration of periodic and extraordinary contributions.
Mobility between funds according to the affiliate's risk profile.
Comprehensive management of affiliates, people, and accounts.
Financial management, valuation, and risk control associated with the funds.
Management of tax benefits in accordance with local regulations.
Self-management portals for affiliates and employers.
Regulatory, accounting, and collective contribution reports.
Operational and financial closing of the funds with full traceability.

cardPensiones3.textoFooter: We manage 43% of voluntary savings in Colombia, representing USD 5 billion

cardPensiones3.title: Severance Module
cardPensiones3.description: <bold>Manages comprehensive severance administration</bold> with high operational volumes and strict regulatory controls, from the same pension core covering affiliate management to fund calculations and legally permitted withdrawals.

items.textos: Management of partial and total withdrawals according to legal causals.
Massive settlement, transfer, and payment processes.
Multi-fund administration with additional benefits.
Integration with payroll, collection systems, and accounting.
Reduction of operational costs and improvement in contribution traceability.

informacionPensiones5.description: Presence in El Salvador, Bolivia, Peru, Colombia, Honduras, and other countries.

informacionPensiones5.title: Proven and expanding regional scale
informacionPensiones5.description: Platform scaling regionally, expanding into new markets such as Chile, Mexico, Dominican Republic, among others. Supporting the growth and evolution of our clients' pension business.

informacionPensiones5.title: Specialized Support
informacionPensiones5.description: Support in implementation and daily operation, backed by a team of over 200 professionals with knowledge of the pension sector, project management, and functional processes.

highlight.description: of the Colombian mandatory pension market supported by our solutions.

High volumes with millions of monthly transactions in pensioner payroll settlement.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: Is it a single software or multiple different solutions?

answer.descriptions: Our platform is comprehensive and modular. This means that, although it operates on a single technological core, you can implement only the modules your entity needs (e.g., only Severance or only Mandatory Pensions) and scale them in the future.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: What entities can use this pension software?

listsItems: Public and private Pension Fund Administrators (AFP).
Companies with their own or special pension regimes.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: Does the software adapt to the regulation of each LATAM country?

answer.descriptions: Yes. The system is highly customizable. We have experience in multiple LATAM countries, allowing us to configure business rules, settlement formulas, and regulatory reports specific to each jurisdiction.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: Can I implement only a few modules and scale later?

answer.descriptions: Yes. The modular architecture allows you to activate only the necessary modules and incorporate new ones as your operation requires, without the need to migrate or redesign.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: Does the software cover pensioner payroll and mass payments?

answer.descriptions: Yes. The Life Annuities and Pensioner Payroll module allows you to settle, calculate, and disburse mass payments in an automated manner, with total control and traceability.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: Does it also work to manage voluntary pension savings or APV?

answer.descriptions: Yes. The Voluntary Pensions module manages voluntary pension savings schemes with multi-fund logic, fund mobility, tax benefits, and self-management portals.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: Can it be used to manage severance pay from the same system?

answer.descriptions: Yes. The Severance module operates on the same pension core, allowing you to manage withdrawals, massive settlements, transfers, and integration with payroll and accounting.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: Is the software multi-country and multi-currency?

answer.descriptions: Yes. The platform is designed to operate in multiple LATAM countries with regulatory parameterization per jurisdiction and multi-currency support.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: What kind of support does Heinsohn offer?

answer.descriptions: We offer comprehensive support: from initial consulting and implementation to daily operational support, backed by a team of over 200 professionals specialized in the pension sector.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesPensiones.question: How to start implementing the pension software?

answer.descriptions: You can schedule a session with our expert team to evaluate your needs, define the project scope, and plan the implementation step by step.
